Status Of Filing Of Proof Of Notification To The San Francisco Police Legal Department At 850 Bryant Street, 5th Floor.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Off Calendar

Status Of Filing Of Proof Of Notification To The San Francisco Police Legal Department At 850 Bryant Street, 5th Floor.
Off Calendar Dec-15-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Petitioner Dean Current present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name to Damian Lake.
Court further ordered Mr. Lake to provide proof of Notice of the name change to San Francisco Police Legal Department at 850 Bryant, 5th Floor. Proof of Notice to be provided no later than December 9, 2014.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-21-2014 Reset To Oct-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
